headline: GE HealthCare (GEHC) Receives FDA Clearance for AI-Powered Radiation Therapy Planning Software
summary: GE HealthCare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:GEHC) is one of the best young stocks to invest in according to hedge funds. On June 4, GE HealthCare received FDA 510(k) clearance for MIM Contour ProtégéAI+ 2.0, an AI-powered software designed to streamline radiation therapy planning. This update introduces new capabilities, including an MR Brain model and an improved […]
